title: antidesma rugosum
intro: Antidesma rugosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved wood apple or rough-leaved wood sorrel. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Antidesma rugosum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Antidesma rugosum can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
